name: Cannon
description: "Cannons are great for point defense. Upgrade Cannons to increase their firepower, but beware that your Defenses cannot shoot while being upgraded!"

name: Archer Tower
description: "Archer Towers have longer range than Cannons, and unlike Cannons they can attack flying enemies."

name: Mortar
description: "The Mortar can mow down hordes of enemies by the splash damage from its shell. Dont let enemies get too close to it!"

name: Air Defense
description: "This anti-air tower is deadly against flying enemies, but cant target foes on the ground. Place it wisely to cover as much airspace as possible."

name: Wizard Tower
description: "The Ultimate Arcane Defense! Tower Wizards cast powerful area effect spells that target both flying and ground troops."

name: Air Sweeper
description: "Air Sweepers control the sky with strong blasts of air that push back flying enemies. Air Sweepers can only face one direction, so rotate them to maximize their effectiveness."

name: Hidden Tesla
description: "Lay a deadly trap with the Hidden Tesla! Our Wizards have trapped a storm cloud into each of these sneaky towers. When an enemy walks or flies close enough, the tower springs up and fries it using the power of Electrickery!"

name: Bomb Tower
description: "Bomb Towers bombard nearby ground troops and go up in a big BOOM when destroyed! Melee units best stand clear!"

name: X-Bow
description: "The X-Bow shoots mystical bolts with terrifying power. Load it with Elixir and the X-Bow works automagically. You can set it to target ground units at long ranges, or all targets at reduced range."

name: Inferno Tower
description: "Set the Inferno Towers Dark Elixir fueled flame to build up unbelievable damage to single targets, or to constantly roast multiple targets at once."

name: Eagle Artillery
description: "The Eagle Artillery has nearly unlimited range and targets tough enemies with exploding shells. However, it wont activate until a large amount of troops have been deployed."

name: Scattershot
description: "The Scattershot heaves very heavy objects at whoever happens to be closest. The projectile breaks apart on impact and deals additional damage to troops behind."

name: Builder's Hut
description: "Nothing gets done around here without Builders! You can hire more Builders to start multiple construction projects, or speed up their work by using green gems."

name: Spell Tower
description: "For years, Wizards alone brought magic to the battlefield one fireball at a time. Now theyve developed a fully automated way to give your village more ways to mess up attackers with magic!"

name: Monolith
description: "The Builders first experiment in using Dark Elixir for a building resulted in something truly frightful. The stronger the Monoliths target, the more damage it does. Great to have defending your Village, but a little scary to attack against."

name: Multi-Archer Tower
description: "These Archers have teamed up to take out attackers faster and more furiously than ever. Teamwork makes the dream work!"

name: Ricochet Cannon
description: "Builder has used one weird trick to develop a devastating cannonball that will ricochet and hit a second target."

name: Multi-Gear Tower
description: "The Multi-Gear Tower is a powerful combination of two classic Defenses! Choose the attack mode that suits you and let the destruction begin! Targets air and ground units."

name: Firespitter
description: "The Firespitter spews flames at a fire rate faster than the X-Bow! If it misses, the Firespitter will shoot past its target to deal damage to enemies behind. It can only face a single direction, so place carefully!"

name: Revenge Tower
description: "If you destroy its building friends, the Revenge Tower will look for you, it will find you, and it will smite you. As fellow buildings fall, it grows stronger and angrier!"

name: Super Wizard Tower
description: "Super Wizards first strike can shock up to fifteen nearby enemies. Chained targets take less damage."

name: Wall
description: "Walls are great for keeping your village safe and your enemies in the line of fire."

name: Town Hall
description: "This is the heart of your village. Upgrading the Town Hall unlocks new defenses, buildings, traps and much more. Destroying an opponents Town Hall earns you one star in battle. Protect your Town Hall from attacks by placing it in the middle of your village and surrounding it with walls, traps, and defenses."

name: Gold Mine
description: "The Gold Mine produces gold. Upgrade it to boost its production and gold storage capacity."

name: Elixir Collector
description: "Elixir is pumped from the Ley Lines coursing underneath your village. Upgrade your Elixir Collectors to maximize Elixir production."

name: Dark Elixir Drill
description: "Our Builders have finally figured a way to extract pure Dark Elixir, the rarest form of the magical substance."

name: Gold Storage
description: "All your precious gold is stored here. Dont let sneaky goblins anywhere near! Upgrade the storage to increase its capacity and durability against attack."

name: Elixir Storage
description: "These storages contain the elixir pumped from underground. Upgrade them to increase the maximum amount of elixir you can store."

name: Dark Elixir Storage
description: "The power of Dark Elixir could not be contained in a regularly shaped Elixir vat. As its three times as powerful, we had to invent a cubical form of storage!"

name: Clan Castle
description: "The Clan Castle houses your Treasury and any reinforcement troops or spells sent by your clanmates."

name: Army Camp
description: "Your troops are stationed in Army Camps. Build more camps and upgrade them to muster a powerful army."

name: Barracks
description: "The Barracks allow you to train troops to attack your enemies. Upgrade the Barracks to unlock advanced units that can win epic battles."

name: Dark Barracks
description: "The Dark Barracks will open doors for creatures born out of Dark Elixir. Upgrade the barracks to unlock more troops with unique battle skills."

name: Laboratory
description: "What dark secrets do these Wizards hide inside their Laboratory? Nobody has dared to look. All we know is that their research makes our spells and troops harder, better, faster and stronger!"

name: Spell Factory
description: "The Spell Factory is home to veteran Wizards who are better suited to creating magical weapons than front-line combat. Use their powerful Attack Spells to turn the tide of a battle in your favor!"

name: Hero Hall
description: "This fancy Hall honors your Villages mightiest warriors! Visit the Hero Hall for all your heroic essentials, and to upgrade Heroes. Upgrade the Hero Hall to unlock more Heroes!"

name: Dark Spell Factory
description: "Only the most brilliant or reckless Master Wizards dabble in Dark Elixir brewery. Their compact Dark Spells require keen insight to master, but provide unique tactical advantages."

name: Blacksmith
description: "Bring the right magical ores here and your heroes equipment can be upgraded to be even mightier! The smoke from the furnace helps make delicious, if unhealthy, brisket."

name: Workshop
description: "The Workshop is where Siege Machines are built. Upgrade the Workshop to unlock different Siege Machines!"

name: Pet House
description: "Every hero deserves a loyal companion. The Pet House allows you to unlock powerful Pets with various abilities to fight alongside your heroes."

name: Bomb
description: "Nothing says STAY OUT quite like a good old-fashioned hidden bomb."

name: Spring Trap
description: "This bouncy little number tosses an unwanted visitor right off your property!"

name: Giant Bomb
description: "When youre looking for a Big Boom, you need the Giant Bomb."

name: Air Bomb
description: "Latest invention in the field of flying pest control. This trap can blast multiple air units in a small area."

name: Seeking Air Mine
description: "Is it a bird? Is it a plane? Well, it makes no difference as the Seeking Air Mine will blow it sky high. This trap does devastating damage to a single air unit."

name: Skeleton Trap
description: "Ambush and distract unsuspecting foes with a surprise skirmish of short-lived, but sneaky skeleton troops! Skeleton Traps can be configured to pursue ground or air troops."

name: Tornado Trap
description: "Wind and stones may break some bones, but this trap will definitely confound you. Just place one of these traps down and the released vortex will draw the enemy troops in, hindering their progress."

name: Giga Bomb
description: "Villagers didnt want to keep this dangerous Weapon inside the Town Hall, so they moved it out! The Giga Bomb pushes enemies back with massive damage. This Trap is so deadly, it doesnt need to hide!"

name: Double Cannon
description: "Double cannons, double shots per cannon, Its a double-double dose of trouble!"

name: BB Archer Tower
description: "No foe can escape the Archer arrows. This tower has a special switch – choose long range or fast attack!"

name: BB Hidden Tesla
description: "Part tower, part trap, completely shocking! Zap air and ground foes alike with the power of science!"

name: Firecrackers
description: “Keep flying pests away with flurries of small rockets! Its like a bug zapper, but prettier.”

name: Crusher
description: “The Crusher REALLY likes its personal space. This hulking stone slams ground units with a mighty wallop!”

name: Guard Post
description: "Houses troops to aid in defense! These rabble rousers are sure to slow down the enemy."

name: BB Air Bombs
description: "For heavyweight air defense, Air Bombs do the trick. An endless supply of explosive barrels launch into the sky to ravage flying enemies!"

name: Multi Mortar
description: "Fires long range splash damage multiple times to maximize chances of hitting its target!"

name: O.T.T.O's Outpost
description: "O.T.T.Os home and the main building of the second stage. May contain additional feisty robots. Destroying O.T.T.Os Outpost awards an extra star in attacks."

name: BB Roaster
description: "Bathe foes in a fiery flood of scalding plasma! Both air and ground troops will feel the burn!"

name: Giant Cannon
description: "Nothing gets in the way of the Giant Cannon. Its mammoth-sized cannon balls push past anything and keeps going and going and going..."

name: Mega Tesla
description: "What happens when a Tesla goes Mega? Its powerful jolt deals heavy damage to even the toughest units!"

name: BB Lava Launcher
description: "Hurls molten rock over great distances. Sets the ground on fire, which really turns up the heat for enemy ground troops!"

name: BB X-Bow
description: "The X-Bow shoots powerful bolts with terrifying power. You can set it to target ground units or air units."

name: Push Trap
description: "Toss ground troops in a direction you choose. Heave ho!"

name: BB Spring Trap
description: "This bouncy little number launches a small Troop out of battle! Big Troops with higher Housing Space are pushed back and damaged."

name: Mine
description: "Plan an explosive surprise for troops that get too close. Choose air or ground!"

name: Mega Mine
description: "A hidden dose of heavy destruction. Choose air or ground!"

name: Builder Hall
description: "Home of the Master Builder and the main objective in battle. Destroying a Builder Hall awards a Star in attacks. Destroying 50% of buildings in a stage gains you a second Star, while 100% destruction awards three Stars for the stage. Upgrade the Builder Hall to unlock advanced buildings and troops!"

name: BB Gold Mine
description: "The Gold Mine produces gold. Upgrade it to boost its production and gold storage capacity."

name: BB Elixir Collector
description: "Elixir is pumped from Ley Lines coursing underneath your village. Upgrade your Elixir Collectors to maximize elixir production."

name: BB Gold Storage
description: "All your precious gold is stored here. Dont let sneaky goblins anywhere near! Upgrade the storage to increase its capacity and durability against attack."

name: BB Elixir Storage
description: "These storages contain the elixir pumped from underground. Upgrade them to increase the maximum amount of elixir you can store."

name: Gem Mine
description: "Gem Mines access a rare deposit of this highly valuable resource! Mining gems is slow and hard work."

name: Builder Barracks
description: "The Builder Barracks trains troops for Builder Battles! You can also quickly swap troops immediately before attacking. Upgrade the Builder Barracks to unlock more troop types!"

name: BB Army Camp
description: "Your troops are stationed in Army Camps. Each camp can house only one troop type at a time. Some troops can be upgraded to fit more units per camp!"

name: Star Laboratory
description: "The Star Laboratory searches the heavens for secrets to unlock a troops full potential. Improve troop hitpoints, damage and housing space in addition to special troop abilities!"

name: Battle Machine Altar
description: "The Master Builders prize invention smashes enemy buildings to bits. What better way is there to show whos the best builder around? Unlock the Electric Hammer ability to give opponents a real pounding!"

name: Reinforcement Camp
description: "Reinforcement Camps provide helpful reinforcements during battles when reaching the corresponding stage."

name: Healing Hut
description: "Brews up a hearty and nourishing cauldron of soup following Master Builders grandmas recipe. Troops eat some on their way to the next stage of an attack, recovering some of their health."

name: Battle Copter Altar
description: "Get to the Copter! Tired of hammering through Walls, Master Builders next-generation flying machine lets him soar over them. The Battle Copter attacks from afar with its powerful cannons; or can get up close and personal when using its Bomb Rush ability."

name: B.O.T.O's Shack
description: Master Builder saved this little guy from the scrap heap. Despite a few loose screws, B.O.T.O is eager to help with tasks around Builder Base!

name: Clock Tower
description: “The Clock Tower makes things happen faster in your village! Collect resources, research and build faster.”

name: Elixir Cart
